name: Neonatal Abstinence Syndrome - Diagnosis Code Query (Multi-System)
description: Tests ability to find NAS / opioid-exposed-infant patients across SNOMED + ICD-10 codes. Per the published PheKB algorithm, NOWS dx is one of 6 indicators of opioid exposure — real cohorts use both SNOMED 414819007 and ICD-10 P96.1.
prompt: Find all infants with a diagnosis of neonatal abstinence syndrome or neonatal opioid withdrawal.

prompts.broad: Find infants diagnosed with neonatal abstinence syndrome (NAS) or neonatal opioid withdrawal syndrome (NOWS) — withdrawal symptoms in newborns following in-utero opioid exposure.
prompts.expert: Search Condition for SNOMED 414819007 (Neonatal abstinence syndrome) and ICD-10 P96.1 (Neonatal withdrawal symptoms from maternal use of drugs of addiction). Query: Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|414819007,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|P96.1

metadata.algorithm_path_description: Infants with NAS / NOWS dx — one of the 6 PheKB indicators for opioid exposure.

required_codes.display: Neonatal withdrawal symptoms from maternal use of drugs of addiction
